title: Surreal Botanical Football Poster AI
sourceTitle: Surreal Botanical Football Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dreamlike football-inspired surrealist illustration for a nostalgic football dream world in a colorful European cityscape with ornate architecture and a giant pink stadium. Subject: fictional football legends sprinting through a magical flower meadow while chasing the ball unfolds around a vintage patterned soccer ball while the stadium and city become part of a romantic botanical fantasy world. Scene: a colorful European cityscape with ornate architecture and a giant pink stadium contains a massive pink stadium, emerald pitch, tiny spectators, ornate architecture, pastel sky, and oversized blooming peonies, floral patterns, and romantic meadow details. Composition: Fixed aerial-to-close-up surreal poster composition with the stadium rising above the city, football action crossing a flower meadow, and close dribbling legs anchoring the foreground. Style: Painterly surreal sports fantasy illustration with vintage poster character, Art Nouveau floral motifs, expressive brushstrokes, contemporary editorial polish, and highly detailed flowers. Color Palette: Fixed pastel pink sky, vibrant emerald pitch, bold blue and green contrasts, floral pinks, warm city accents, and rich painterly texture. Lighting: Expressive cinematic light with romantic sky glow, colorful city atmosphere, glossy pitch highlights, and luminous botanical accents. Signature Elements: Massive pink stadium, European cityscape, magical flower meadow, oversized peonies, vintage patterned soccer ball, football action, and Art Nouveau sports romance. Restrictions: Keep the scene cohesive, painterly, richly detailed, logo-free, watermark-free, text-free, and free of copied real-player likeness.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
